Bash(PGPASSWORD=U7thxqU8NDlVuRKy psql -h aws-1-ap-northeast-2.pooler.supabase.com -p 6543 -U postgres.kdmxcvlenegvqxpgbaqg -d postgres -c "SELECT id, name, email FROM users ORDER BY id;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=U7thxqU8NDlVuRKy psql -h aws-1-ap-northeast-2.pooler.supabase.com -p 6543 -U postgres.kdmxcvlenegvqxpgbaqg -d postgres -f test_orders.sql)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=U7thxqU8NDlVuRKy psql -h aws-1-ap-northeast-2.pooler.supabase.com -p 6543 -U postgres.kdmxcvlenegvqxpgbaqg -d postgres -c "
SELECT ''USERS:'' as type, COUNT(*) as count FROM users
UNION ALL
SELECT ''INVENTORY:'', COUNT(*) FROM inventory
UNION ALL
SELECT ''ORDERS:'', COUNT(*) FROM orders
UNION ALL
SELECT ''ORDER_ITEMS:'', COUNT(*) FROM order_items;
")
